reviews.comment:
La distribución de los surtidores... la diseñó un aficionado!.. Muy incómodo para entrar y salir...  tenés que esperar sobre la Av Martín García... y molestás a los vecinos que intenten ingresar a sus cocheras.
Ahí hago los cambios de aceite y filtro (los engrasadores 10 puntos) pero cuando vas a la caja para pagar... "Hay problemas de sistema para aplicar las promociones de Serviclub".. Y te lo perdés!

(Translated by Google)
The layout of the pumps... it was designed by an amateur! It's very inconvenient to get in and out... you have to wait on Martín García Avenue... and you're bothering the neighbors trying to get into their garages. I get my oil and filter changed there (the grease technicians are excellent), but when you go to the register to pay... "There are system problems applying Serviclub promotions"... And you miss out!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM0eGJhQlNBEAE
